UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Trinity Management Services is present. Represented by Rosa Rennzzi.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Konstantin Kosov is present.
Attorney Joanna Allen representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of June -18-2012 is vacated.(501/JPT)
